_comment: Deployment lead times (time-to-energy) per source, in DAYS. Synced from labmate fork (fschweden/energy_ai_hack_DC commit 05983f4a 'Adjust default buildout times'): PV 2.0yr, ElectricStorage 2.0yr, Generator 4.0yr, Wind 3.0yr. MVP hard assumption: as soon as a source is used (any amount), its full lead time applies; system buildout time = MAX over used sources (parallel deployment). Grid is already connected (0).
